_comment: Real-world Tauri apps used to re-verify Victauri compatibility against the CURRENT version.
SHAs were captured 2026-06-03 from each repo's default-branch HEAD; bump them deliberately so a retest is reproducible.

frontend_build runs from the repo root and MUST populate the tauri.conf frontendDist directory BEFORE the debug cargo build — debug binaries embed frontendDist at compile time (a dev server is not used here).
tauri_dir is the crate dir containing the app's Cargo.toml + tauri.conf.json.
These build commands are starting points; the first compat CI run is expected to confirm or adjust them per app.

apps.name: Kanri
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm generate

apps.name: En Croissant
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm build

apps.name: Surrealist
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm build

apps.name: Duckling
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm build

apps.name: Lettura
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm build
